---
title: "GDAL Vector Drivers"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GDAL Vector Drivers}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
# library(gdalvector)
```

List all currently available GDAL vector drivers:

```{r}
#| label: gdal_driver_formats
#| echo: TRUE
#| eval: TRUE


gdal_driver_formats_tbl <- gdalraster::gdal_formats() |> tibble::as_tibble()
```
